entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (1408) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD CSDES AND INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS PRICE AND CASE NUMBERS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU7281.01E. 2. TO ADD CSDES AND INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS PRICE AND CASE NUMBERS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU7282.01E. 3. TO ADD ONE (1) DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU7283.01E. 4. TO ADD ONE (1) SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE (SED) TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU7287.01P.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (772) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDS ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3839.01E.
2. ADDS CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS) C3MP UPGRADE FROM BASIC TO ALL MEDIA, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3947.01E.
3. ADDS CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS) C3MP STATION WEB PORTAL, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3948.01E.
4. ADDS THREE (3) HEWLETT PACKARD SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3956.01E.
5. ADDS ACCESS ETHERNET NSC, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3953.01E.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (820) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES WITHIN OUR NETWORX, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4212.01E.
TO ADD ONE (1) QUIKTRON SED TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVAT NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4228.01E.
TO ADD PRICE FOR DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS WITHIN OUR NETWORX OFFER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4230.01E. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE WITHIN OUR NETWORX OFFER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4233.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) ETHERNET PRIVATE LINE SERVICE (PLS) DOMESTIC TRANSPORT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4150.01E.
THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
